text.title: Mutation Testing Bootstrap Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable inputs to a rule from `01-core-rules.xml`. MANDATORY for every methodology — even flat ones — per F-066 DoD.

decision-tree.root-question: Is line+branch coverage already ≥80% AND flake rate = 0%?

example.trace: ready=true → language=python → use-mutmut → bootstrap config + PR-scope + 20% gate

text.example: Concrete walk: Repo has pytest at 92% coverage, zero flakes, Python — wire mutmut config, mutate src/ excluding generated, set gate 20%, 8-min PR job.
